subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face towards God! The paintings and designs which were made by thee and sent through Mirza Abdul Fadzl were received
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طفل مبتهل الی الله نقوش و تصویری که از قلم تو صادر بواسطه جناب ابی الفضل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @education and the development of capacity, @education of children; moral education
